info.name: AmanaPOS API
info.description:
AmanaPOS API — Full test flow:

**Public** (no token): `/api-public/v1/...`
**Private** (token required): `/api/v1/...`

### Flow
1. Staff creates owner → `POST /api/v1/auth/register/` (staff JWT)
2. Owner logs in → Login/OTP (public)
3. Owner creates business → `POST /api/v1/tenants/businesses/`
4. Owner creates staff → `POST /api/v1/users/`
5. Staff logs in → Login/OTP (public)

**Dev OTP:** `123456`  
**Swagger:** `http://localhost:8080/api/docs/`

item.name: Public Auth

request.description: Step 1: send OTP to phone. Works even with an expired token in header.
Verify OTP to complete login. Optionally include fcm_token + platform to register the device push token in the same request.

body.raw:
{
  "phone": "+249912776979",
  "otp": "123456",
  "_comment": "FCM fields below are optional \u2014 include to register push token on login",
  "fcm_token": "{{fcm_token}}",
  "platform": "android",
  "device_id": "optional-device-uuid",
  "app_version": "1.0.0"
}

item.description: No token required. Safe to call even when logged out.

item.name: Admin Panel
item.description:
Platform-admin-only endpoints. Requires is_staff=True JWT token.

**Login as:** `+249900000000` / `@$Sudanafoog9696`

All responses wrapped in `{success, data}`. Lists use DRF PageNumberPagination.

request.description: Returns total owners, businesses, shops, active/expired subscriptions, monthly growth chart data, and 10 most recent owner registrations.
Paginated list of all business owners. Annotated with business_count and has_active_subscription.
Filter owners by full_name or phone.
Paginated list of all businesses. Annotated with shop_count, has_active_subscription, subscription_end_date.
Search by business name, owner full_name, or owner phone.
All subscriptions across all businesses. Use ?status=active or ?status=expired to filter.
Create a shop-type business. Inventory and stock tracking are enabled. business_type defaults to 'shop' if omitted.
Create a restaurant-type business. Inventory is disabled. Sales do not require or deduct stock. stock[] in bootstrap will be empty.
Change an existing business to restaurant type. Valid values: shop, restaurant.
Full business detail including business_type, shops, active subscription.

item.name: Notifications

request.description: Returns the current user's notification history, newest first. Paginated.
Returns the number of unread in-app notifications for the current user.
Marks a single notification as read. Returns 404 if it doesn't belong to the current user.
Marks all unread notifications as read for the current user.
Register or refresh an FCM token for the authenticated user. If the token already exists it is updated (no duplicate). platform: android | ios | web
Deactivate a push token on logout or explicit opt-out. Only deactivates tokens belonging to the current user.
Lists the current user's registered device tokens. For debugging/admin purposes.

item.description:
Push notification and in-app notification endpoints.

Flow:
1. Mobile app gets FCM token from Firebase SDK on startup.
2. Register token via POST /devices/register/ (or pass fcm_token in login verify body).
3. Backend queues push delivery through Celery — login/sale never block on FCM.
4. App polls GET / on open to display missed notifications (offline-first).
